description_long: This lantern features a robust, rounded metal base and frame with a slightly weathered, dark bronze finish. The central body is cylindrical and a muted yellow color, likely designed to house the light source, with a subtle geometric emblem embossed on the front. Two sturdy, curved side arms connect the base to the top, providing structural support and a classic lantern silhouette. A thin, arched metal handle is attached at the top, allowing for easy carrying or hanging. The lantern's design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for outdoor or urban environments. The absence of visible glass panels and the solid central body indicate a utilitarian style, possibly for use with an internal bulb or oil lamp.
description: A sturdy, dark bronze and yellow cylindrical lantern with a metal handle and embossed emblem, designed for carrying or hanging. Its solid, utilitarian build is ideal for outdoor or urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the embossed emblem on the yellow cylindrical body and the full arch of the metal handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved side arm and the solid, uninterrupted yellow body with the handle extending upward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the yellow cylinder and the symmetrical metal frame, with no emblem visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other curved arm and the handle's attachment point.
